title: Pack of 10 Dark Green Acid Free 50 x 70cm Tissue Paper Sheets
features: Pack of 10 Dark Green Acid Free 50 x 70cm Tissue Paper Sheets.
Add a touch of elegance and protection to your packaging with our premium Tissue Paper – 10 Sheets pack.
Perfect for gift wrapping, crafts, or cushioning delicate items, each sheet is soft, lightweight, and easy to fold or shape.
Ideal for birthdays, weddings, retail packaging, and DIY projects, this versatile tissue paper comes in a convenient pack of 10 to suit all your creative and practical needs.
description: Product Description Tissue Paper Sheets for Wrapping and Crafts 50 x 70cm These tissue paper sheets each measure 50 x 70cm. The material is lightweight and flexible, making it suitable for wrapping, crafting, or packaging. The surface is soft and can be folded, shaped, or layered as needed. These sheets are suitable for a wide range of decorative, protective, and creative applications. Tissue Paper 50 x 70cm Each sheet of tissue paper measures 50 x 70cm. The lightweight material is easy to handle and can be used for wrapping, layering, or cushioning. The size is suitable for a variety of packaging and craft tasks. Soft and Flexible Material The tissue paper is soft and flexible, allowing it to be folded or shaped to suit different uses. It can be used to line packaging, wrap delicate items, or add decorative elements to gifts or displays. Suitable for Wrapping, Packaging and Crafts This tissue paper can be used for gift wrapping, protective packaging, or creative craft projects. The versatile material supports a wide range of decorative and practical applications. Ideal for a Range of Craft Projects This tissue paper is suitable for a variety of craft uses. It can be cut, layered, folded, or shaped for creative projects such as collages, paper flowers, decorations, and more. The material works well for both simple and more detailed craft applications.
